description: Reduced-state local linear representation of the full two-asset HANK model, used to filter policy-relevant macro and distributional state components from noisy observables before applying a classical policy rule.

state_interpretation.rstar_gap: Отклонение естественной ставки / агрегированного спросового фактора

timing_note: Noisy macro releases enter the Kalman update contemporaneously; the policy rate is treated as an exactly known instrument chosen by the regulator.
